content: Current state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memories can be rearchitected to gate intrinsic curiosity signal generation from the Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) only to high-uncertainty memory embeddings identified via the active learning selection process, eliminating redundant ICM computation on low-value stored experiences. This creates a synergistic loop where active learning improves memory efficiency for ICM, and memory-efficient ICM in turn provides the high-quality intrinsic reward that drives better active memory expansion.
source_topics: Memory-efficient ICM implementation for large-scale autonomous agents
